data.name: label3.Text
data.value: Do not perform a Stocker mapping to use the database records.

data.name: tlpPassMapping.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="btnStockerMapping" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnUsingDataBase" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="label3" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="2" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,50,Percent,50" /><Rows Styles="Percent,50,Percent,50" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="labWaferID" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="SlotName" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="2" /><Control Name="WaferIDData" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="labWaferGrade" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="WaferGradeData" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="labM12ID" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="labLotID" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="labVCL" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="btnSlotStausUpdate" Row="6" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="2" /><Control Name="M12IDData" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="LotIDData" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="VCLData" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,50,Percent,50" /><Rows Styles="Percent,14.28571,Percent,14.28571,Percent,14.28571,Percent,14.28571,Percent,14.28571,Percent,14.28571,Percent,14.28571,Absolute,20,Absolute,20,Absolute,20,Absolute,20,Absolute,20" /></TableLayoutSettings>
